note: Phase G items — gated behind Gate 7 per ADR-007. Nothing here is in active scope until Phase 1 judge test passes.

items.title: Consensus merge strategy
items.notes: Quorum vote across signers before accepting conflicting claims.

items.title: LLM-judge merge strategy
items.notes: Opt-in; uses a small local model or API to reconcile semantic conflicts with lineage.

items.title: Adversarial mode + incident replay UI
items.notes: Auto-quarantine on trust decay; tamper alarms; incident export.

items.title: as_of strategy replay CLI
items.notes: `weavory replay --as-of=T` to rewind belief state for strategy branching.

items.title: Attestation API + reputation queries
items.notes: Capability advertisements piggybacked on beliefs; hash-locked belief exchange for lightweight escrow.

items.title: libp2p gossipsub federation
items.notes: Feature-flagged; eventual consistency with bounded staleness. Disabled by default.

items.title: Client SDKs (TS + Python)
items.notes: Thin MCP wrappers; not new interfaces.

items.title: Prometheus + OpenTelemetry full wiring
items.notes: Production observability. Minimum viable OTel traces in Phase F.

items.title: Homebrew tap + Docker image
items.notes: Distribution polish. `npx` is sufficient for Phase 1.
